item.name: False Oval Spectacles
item.description: Wish to look more intelligent with minimal effort? Then look no further than these superb specs. Though these were once considered a fashion accessory, trends are ever changing, and style enthusiasts now classify them as facewear. Use to unlock oval spectacles.

ornament.name: False Spectacles
ornament.description: Don a pair of oval spectacles that do not improve your eyesight in any way.
